name: Surprise Doll Balloon Box
description: Surprise Doll Balloon Box Create magical moments with our Surprise Doll Balloon Box With Chocolate. A delightful surprise for any celebration!
story: Each stitch tells a story — this plush elephant is handmade by artisans in Siem Reap using traditional sewing techniques.

name: Romantic Pink Roses & Big Teddy Set
description: Spoil her with pink perfection! A stunning pink rose bouquet, cuddly pink teddy bear, and dreamy pink heart balloons—the ultimate Valentine’s Day gift!
story: Inspired by the sacred lotus that rises from the mud, this pendant is a timeless token of love and hope.

name: Sweet Flower Bouquet Balloons
description: Sweet Flower Bouquet Balloons Make their day memorable with our Surprise Gift Set. A delightful surprise for your loved one! Quantity
story: Carved by skilled woodworkers in Kampong Thom, this toy brings joy and a touch of Khmer craftsmanship to playtime.

name: Ecuador Elegance Rose Bouquet
description: A captivating mix of rare toffee roses , red Explorer blooms , and RP Moab tones , this premium bouquet makes a timeless and bold gift.Quantity
story: Harvested from the gardens of Battambang, these floral teas capture the essence of Cambodia's blooming landscapes.

name: Valentine’s Red Rose Surprise Bouquet
description: Express love with the Valentine's Red Rose Surprise Bouquet—fresh premium red roses, elegantly wrapped for a romantic, unforgettable gift.
story: Each petal is hand-cut and sewn from premium Cambodian silk, creating an everlasting floral arrangement.

name: Silver Flower Charm Bracelet
description: An elegant silver bracelet adorned with small flower charms, each representing a different Cambodian bloom.
story: Each charm is hand-engraved with a unique floral pattern, making this bracelet a wearable garden of memories.

name: Honey Gift Box
description: Pure Cambodian wild honey infused with local flowers, presented in an elegant gift-ready box.
story: Sourced from sustainable bee farms in Mondulkiri, this honey carries the sweet fragrance of Cambodian wildflowers.

name: Summer Mini Chiffon Cake Collection | Fresh Cream & Assorted Fruits
description: A refined collection of mini chiffon cakes featuring an ultra-soft, airy sponge layered with smooth fresh cream and topped with assorted fruits - blueberry, green grape,
story: Designed to teach children about Cambodia's wildlife, each piece is sanded smooth and painted with care.

name: Wooden Flower Sculpture
description: An intricately carved wooden flower sculpture that captures the delicate beauty of Cambodia's national flower, the rumdul.
story: This sculpture is a tribute to the rumdul flower, Cambodia's national flower, carved with meticulous detail.

name: Embroidered Floral Pillow
description: A soft cushion cover hand-embroidered with vibrant floral motifs, adding warmth and color to any home.
story: Embroidered by women cooperatives in Takeo province, each pillow tells a story through its floral patterns.

name: Gold-Plated Flower Earrings
description: Elegant gold-plated earrings designed as tiny blooming flowers, perfect for adding a delicate touch to any outfit.
story: Inspired by the small wildflowers that bloom along the Mekong, these earrings capture nature's delicate beauty.

name: Gourmet Spice Gift Set
description: A curated set of Cambodia's finest spices and herbs, beautifully packaged in a keepsake gift box.
story: This set brings together the signature flavors of Cambodia for a culinary journey your loved ones will treasure.

name: Marshmallows Soft Toy
description: Trouble comes in twos! Amuseable Pink and White Marshmallows have a lot in common, like praline cord boots, stitchy smiles and rosy blushes. Linked with a pink satin ribbon, these cheeky mallows are friends for life.
story: Each bear wears a real handwoven krama scarf, making it a unique fusion of comfort and Cambodian heritage.

name: Silver Flower Ring
description: A stunning silver ring with a hand-carved flower blossom, adjustable for the perfect fit.
story: The flower blossom design symbolizes growth and new beginnings, making it a meaningful gift for someone special.

name: Jellycat Amuseables Birthday Cake
description: It’s lovely to have cake on your birthday – but the fun doesn’t need to stop there! Big or small, every moment deserves a slice of joy. Completed your to-do list? A random Tuesday? Let’s celebrate it.
story: Each chime is tuned by hand by artisans in the Cambodian countryside, creating calming harmonies with every breeze.

name: Scented Soy Candle Set
description: A set of hand-poured soy candles scented with jasmine, frangipani, and lemongrass — made from natural Cambodian ingredients.
materials: Soy wax, essential oils, cotton wick
story: These candles are infused with essential oils extracted from Cambodian flowers, bringing the garden indoors.

name: Handmade Flower Hairpin
description: A delicate flower-shaped hairpin handcrafted from brass with a golden finish, perfect as a small token of affection.
story: Inspired by the blossoms that adorn Angkor Wat's stone carvings, this hairpin brings ancient elegance to everyday style.

name: Jellycat Amuseables Peanut
description: If you’re looking for a cheeky handful – you’ve just found it! Salute the great Amuseables Peanut who has won many hearts with his disarming smiles and outrageous dance moves.
story: These tiny animals are crocheted by women artisans in Phnom Penh, bringing smiles one stitch at a time.
